headline: NIQ and Ulta Beauty Announce Strategic Data Sharing Collaboration
summary: CHICAGO, April 30, 2026--NielsenIQ (NYSE: NIQ), a leading consumer intelligence company, and Ulta Beauty, the largest U.S. specialty beauty retailer, today announced a strategic data sharing collaboration to expand industry visibility into the U.S. beauty marketplace and strengthen decision-making for brands and retailers.

raw.headline: NIQ and Ulta Beauty Announce Strategic Data Sharing Collaboration
raw.summary: CHICAGO, April 30, 2026--NielsenIQ (NYSE: NIQ), a leading consumer intelligence company, and Ulta Beauty, the largest U.S. specialty beauty retailer, today announced a strategic data sharing collaboration to expand industry visibility into the U.S. beauty marketplace and strengthen decision-making for brands and retailers.

headline: NielsenIQ and Ulta Beauty Form Strategic Collaboration For Data Sharing
summary: Under the agreement, Ulta Beauty will share sales data for inclusion in NIQ's forthcoming Full View™ of Beauty channel, significantly enhancing omnichannel measurement across prestige and mass beauty and wellness.

raw.headline: NielsenIQ and Ulta Beauty Form Strategic Collaboration For Data Sharing
raw.summary: Under the agreement, Ulta Beauty will share sales data for inclusion in NIQ's forthcoming Full View™ of Beauty channel, significantly enhancing omnichannel measurement across prestige and mass beauty and wellness.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: NIQ, Ulta Beauty Collaborate on Data Sharing
summary: The retailer will provide sales data for NIQ's "Full View of Beauty" channel, and NIQ will become Ulta's primary insights panel provider.
